title: Tonight — 2026-04-26 wrap-up
html:
Tonight — 2026-04-26 build-night wrap-up

Underscore-prefixed so it sorts to the top of the vault file tree. Read this when you open Obsidian tomorrow.

What we did tonight

Six agents ran in parallel:

  1. Apple Notes ingest — bypassed the broken Importer plugin path, read the macOS Notes SQLite store directly, dropped 466 files into raw/apple-notes/ as YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md. 10 of them got the first real INGEST treatment, spanning 2019–2026 to surface the full arc.
  2. Screenshots ingest — 217 screenshots harvested into raw/screenshots/ with frontmatter (per docs/IMPORT-SCREENSHOTS.md).
  3. Claude Code sessions archive — pulled 102 session transcripts into raw/claude-code/. After review (docs/CLAUDE-CODE-DECISION.md), default-ignored from the wiki ingest path because they are work telemetry, not personal thinking.
  4. GitHub READMEs sweep — 85 repo READMEs into raw/github/, also default-ignored.
  5. Plugin install + config — 9 plugins live: Obsidian Git, ExcaliBrain (with Dataview + Excalidraw deps), Smart Connections, Automatic Linker, Hover Editor, Importer, Style Settings.
  6. Git remote — private GitHub repo at YG4PRESIDENT/SecondBrain, 17 commits pushed. Vault is no longer single-machine.
  7. End-of-night documentation pass (this agent) — refreshed README, ROADMAP, index, log; produced wiki/lint-report.md; wrote this note; status-headered the one-shot decision docs; improved brain status.

The first batch of 10 summaries seeds the graph across the full arc: 2019 letter-to-self on a Phoenix→Portland flight (note as letter to self), 2019 pitch-deck scratchpad (disruption, elevator pitch, legacy question), 2020 Facebook pandemic watchlist, 2021 circus parable, 2022 One Hundred Years of Solitude reading log, 2022 Ahmad Jamal stream (the densest node — 28 wikilinks, +21 stubs, jazz / crypto / ChatGPT / OSU CS), 2024 departing-China end-of-chapter, 2025 peacock-bar incident, 2025 how-im-scraping-by, and 2026 rankett.com strategy junk-drawer.

Where the vault stands right now

Thing Count
Raw apple-notes 466
Raw screenshots 217
Raw github READMEs 85 (default-ignored)
Raw claude-code sessions 102 (default-ignored)
Wiki summaries 11 (10 ingest + 1 meta-summary)
Wiki entities 37
Wiki concepts 29
Wiki projects 2
Wiki canvases 0
Stubs awaiting densify ~67
Broken wikilinks flagged 8 (see lint-report.md)
Plugins installed 9
Commits on main 18
Git remote live (private, pushed)

The graph now has real shape. The biggest hubs by inbound-link count are likely rankett, Memory, china (4 inbound from the China-chapter cluster), and the note as letter to self / legacy question concepts that act as connective tissue across years.

What's pending Yahir's interactive action

Two things, both eyes-on-screen:

  1. Submit Google Takeout — takeout.google.com → select Drive → submit. Then wait for the email (~hours). Once the export arrives, the existing pipeline ingests it; no further setup needed.
  2. Tune the graph view in Obsidian — ⌘, → Appearance → toggle the graph-glow and node-labels CSS snippets ON. Then ⌘G → Groups tab → paste the 5 color queries from docs/PLUGIN-FINAL.md. Then set Force settings: Center 0.3, Repel 15, Link 0.8, Distance 250. This is the moment the graph stops looking like a debug console.

Everything else on the roadmap is either done, automated, or low-leverage right now.

The one thing to look at first tomorrow

Open Obsidian → ⌘O → type _tonight → enter → read this file. Then ⌘G to open graph view. You'll see a real cluster: the China-chapter (departure, cyclical time, end of chapter reflection), the founder-thread (2019 pitching → rankett), the literary thread (gabriel garcia marquez → one hundred years of solitude → man from the future), and the music thread (ahmad jamal / bill evans / john coltrane / miles davis / louis armstrong).

This is the first time the graph is showing the shape of your own thinking instead of a placeholder skeleton.

Then run brain ingest in your terminal. There are 460 more apple-notes waiting, and the densest hubs will keep emerging from each sweep.

Generated by the end-of-night documentation agent. Won't be regenerated — future tonight-wrap notes will live at wiki/_tonight-YYYY-MM-DD.md.
